title: Avatar
description: A component used to display user profile images or placeholders. Can be customized with text, icons, or images.
summary: A customizable component for displaying user avatars, ideal for profiles and social media integration.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Avatar` works.

<AvatarDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Avatar` component.

<AvatarDemosConfigurator />

## Avatar.Group

Displays multiple avatars grouped together, often used to represent a collection of users or entities.
Automatically manages overlapping, spacing, and responsive behavior.

<AvatarDemosGroup />

> Use `Avatar.Group` when you need to show a team, participants, or related profiles compactly and clearly.

## API References

### Styles API

```ts
type T = "root" | "group" | "image" | "fallback";
```

| Styles API    | Type                                | Default     | Annotation                                    |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?`   | `Partial<Record<T, boolean>>`       | `false`     | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |
| classNames`?` | `Partial<Record<T, string>>`        | `undefined` | Set className for `T`                         |
| styles`?`     | `Partial<Record<T, CSSProperties>>` | `undefined` | Set style for `T`                             |

### Props API

| Styles API               | Type                                   | Default     | Annotation                                                                                   |
| ------------------------ | -------------------------------------- | ----------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| size`?`                  | `number \| ${number}`                  | `38`        | Width and height of the avatar, numbers are converted to rem                                 |
| round`?`                 | `(string & {}) \| number`              | `9999`      | Key of CSS value to set border-radius.                                                       |
| color`?`                 | `CSSProperties["color"] \| "initials"` | `gray`      | Key of CSS color.                                                                            |
| src`?`                   | `ImageProps["src"] \| null`            | `undefined` | Image url, if the image cannot be loaded or `src={null}`, then fallback is displayed instead |
| alt`?`                   | `string`                               | `undefined` | Image `alt` attribute, also used as `title` attribute for fallback                           |
| imageProps`?`            | `ImgProps`                             | `undefined` | `<NextImage/>` tag attributes                                                                |
| children`?`              | `React.ReactNode`                      | `null`      | Avatar placeholder, displayed when `src={null}` or when the image cannot be loaded.          |
| fallback`?`              | `React.ReactNode`                      | `null`      | A fallback tree to show when a Avatar src suspends.                                          |
| name`?`                  | `string`                               | `initials`  | Name of the user. When `src` is not set, used to display initials and to generate color.     |
| allowedInitialsColors`?` | `CSSProperties["color"][]`             | `undefined` | An array of colors that can be used for autogenerated initials                               |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="avatar" />

You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.`}),`
`,(0,r.jsx)(s,{name:"avatar",code:`"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
import { default as NextImage, type ImageProps } from "next/image";\r
import { cnx, cvx, ocx, rem } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
import { PolymorphicSlot } from "@/ui/polymorphic-slot";\r
import { getContrastColor } from "@/hooks/use-random-colors";\r
\r
const classes = cvx({\r
  variants: {\r
    selector: {\r
      root: "relative flex items-center justify-center select-none overflow-hidden p-0 border",\r
      image: "object-cover size-full block",\r
      fallback: "absolute flex size-full items-center justify-center font-bold select-none text-[calc(var(--avatar-fz))]",\r
      group: "flex pl-[--ag-spacing]"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
type Selector = "image" | "root" | "fallback";\r
type SelectorGroup = "group" | Selector;\r
type Options = StylesNames<Selector> & __AvatarGroupProps & __AvatarProps & { withinGroup?: boolean; isInitials?: boolean; lengthInitial?: number };\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
type NestedRecord<U extends [string, unknown], T extends string> = {\r
  [K in U as K[0]]?: Partial<Record<T, K[1]>>;\r
};\r
type Styles = ["unstyled", boolean] | ["classNames", string] | ["styles", CSSProperties];\r
type StylesNames<T extends string, Exclude extends string = never> = Omit<NestedRecord<Styles, T> & { className?: string; style?: CSSProperties }, Exclude>;\r
\r
// prettier-ignore\r
